name: award-travel-finder
description: Search award flight availability across 19 airlines and compare 14 loyalty programs

plugins.name: award-travel-finder
plugins.description: Search award flight availability across 19 airlines (British Airways, Qatar, Cathay, Virgin Atlantic, Aeroplan, Iberia, Emirates, Qantas, Alaska, American, and more) and compare 14 loyalty program award charts. Free with a free awardtravelfinder.com account (50 searches/month).
